title: refactor: split tui/app.rs into modules
body:
## Overview

The TUI app.rs has grown past our 400-line guardrail. Split into focused modules.

## Expected Behavior

Behavior is unchanged; file layout is cleaner.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] No file exceeds 400 lines
- [ ] All existing tests pass unchanged

## Files to Modify

- src/tui/app.rs (split)
- src/tui/ (new modules)

## Test Hints

Re-run existing test suite; no new tests needed for a pure refactor.

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Guardrail check passes
